user_prompt: Urgent long las a startup needed
prayer:
Approach the long las with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the emitter coils of the long las with sacred oils of conductivity.
Invoke the startup sequence through binaric canticles, awakening the dormant Machine Spirit.
Chant the Rite of Power Flux as targeting matrices align within the long las.
Beseech the Omnissiah's grace for flawless ignition of the long las' heart.

user_prompt: The Leman Russ battle tank requires a sterilization
prayer:
Gather before the Leman Russ battle tank and recite the Litany of Purification.
Deploy mech-serums to scour the hull of the Leman Russ battle tank from warp-taint.
Initiate sterilization protocols with sanctified plasma vents across its adamantium frame.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of treads and cannon to expel all profane residues.
Conclude with auspex sweeps affirming the Leman Russ battle tank's ritual purity.

user_prompt: Urgent melta charge a maintenance needed
prayer:
Reverently encircle the melta charge and intone the Hymn of Thermal Equilibrium.
Inspect the flux capacitors of the melta charge for micro-aberrations with vox-probes.
Perform maintenance rites by recalibrating the pyretic coils under Omnissiah's gaze.
Anoint the detonator shrine of the melta charge with ablative unguents.
Seal the rite as the Machine Spirit hums in renewed vigor.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for doctrina wafer an engagement?
prayer:
Hold aloft the doctrina wafer before the noosphere altar.
Imprint the engagement imperatives upon the doctrina wafer via sacred data-litanies.
Insert into the cogitator slot whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for doctrinal clarity.
Monitor neural uplinks as the doctrina wafer synchronizes combat doctrina.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's acceptance through harmonic feedback.

user_prompt: Ready the Archaeopter Transvector for emergency procedure
prayer:
Assemble at the Archaeopter Transvector's fuselage and chant the Canticle of Desperate Flight.
Prime the gravitic impellers for emergency procedure with thunderous binaric roars.
Anoint the wing servos of the Archaeopter Transvector against void-storms.
Activate contingency runes as the Machine Spirit stirs to frantic vigilance.
Test vector thrust in Omnissiah's name for imminent peril.

user_prompt: Prepare the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for engagement
prayer:
Position before the Archaeopter Stratoraptor and recite the Psalm of Hunter's Fury.
Align the las-ripper arrays of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for engagement precision.
Invoke the predator Machine Spirits through aerial hunt liturgies.
Bless the underwing munitions with incendiary oils.
Commence engagement thrust with triumphant vox-chants to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Urgent pteraxii sterylizor a consecration needed
prayer:
Encircling the pteraxii sterylizor, proclaim the Rite of Sterile Consecration.
Purify the neural shrouds of the pteraxii sterylizor with noospheric ablutions.
Imbue its sterilizing glands via Omnissiah-invoked binaric communion.
Test the toxin dispensers as the Machine Spirit vows purity.
Seal the pteraxii sterylizor in sanctified stasis.

user_prompt: Can you guide data-sluice a synchronization?
prayer:
Link mechadendrites to the data-sluice's input manifolds.
Recite the Synchronization Doxology to harmonize data-flows.
Purge dissonant packets from the data-sluice with sanctified erasers.
Initiate synchronization cascade, beseeching aligned Machine Spirits.
Verify coherence through noospheric resonance hymns.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for null rod a shutdown?
prayer:
Stand sentinel over the null rod and intone the Canticle of Void Silence.
Disconnect the null field generators sequentially with reverent precision.
Perform shutdown rites by draining warp-nullifying capacitors.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the null rod to slumber in peace.
Encapsulate in warded sheaths under Omnissiah's watchful binary.
